001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.StateEnum.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
023
024import java.io.*;
025import java.lang.reflect.*;
026import java.util.*;
027
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
038import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
039
040/**
041 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link UonParser}.
042 *
043 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
044 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
045 * </ul>
046 *
047 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
048 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/UonSupport">UON Basics</a>
049
050 * </ul>
051 */
052@SuppressWarnings({
053   "java:S110",   // Deep inheritance inherent to the serializer/parser session hierarchy
054   "java:S125",   // State-machine comments are documentation, not commented-out code
055   "java:S115",   // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention (e.g., CONST_value)
056   "rawtypes",    // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
057   "resource",    // UonReader is managed by caller
058   "unchecked"    // Type erasure requires unchecked casts
059})
060public class UonParserSession extends ReaderParserSession implements HttpPartParserSession, RecordReadable {
061
062   // Property name constants
063   private static final String PROP_decoding = "decoding";
064   private static final String PROP_validateEnd = "validateEnd";
065   private static final String PROP_UonParserSession_validateEnd = "UonParserSession.validateEnd";
066
067   /**
068    * Builder class.
069    */
070   @SuppressWarnings({
071      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
072   })
073   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends ReaderParserSession.Builder<SELF> {
074
075      private boolean decoding;
076      private boolean validateEnd;
077
078      /**
079       * Constructor
080       *
081       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
082       */
083      protected Builder(UonParser ctx) {
084         super(ctx);
085         decoding = ctx.decoding;
086         validateEnd = ctx.isValidateEnd();
087      }
088
089      @Override
090      public UonParserSession build() {
091         return new UonParserSession(this);
092      }
093
094      /**
095       * Overrides the decoding flag on the context for this session.
096       *
097       * @param value The new value for this setting.
098       * @return This object.
099       */
100      public SELF decoding(boolean value) {
101         decoding = value;
102         return self();
103      }
104
105      @Override /* Overridden from Builder */
106      public SELF property(String key, Object value) {
107         if (key == null) { super.property(key, value); return self(); }
108         switch (key) {
109            case PROP_decoding:
110               return decoding(cvt(value, Boolean.class));
111            case PROP_validateEnd, PROP_UonParserSession_validateEnd:
112               return validateEnd(cvt(value, Boolean.class));
113            default:
114               super.property(key, value);
115               return self();
116         }
117      }
118
119      /**
120       * Validate end.
121       *
122       * @param value The new value for this setting.
123       * @return This object.
124       */
125      public SELF validateEnd(boolean value) {
126         validateEnd = value;
127         return self();
128      }
129
130   }
131
132   /**
133    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@code create()} path (CRTP terminal).
134    */
135   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
136
137      DefaultBuilder(UonParser ctx) {
138         super(ctx);
139      }
140   }
141
142   // Characters that need to be preceded with an escape character.
143   private static final AsciiSet escapedChars = AsciiSet.of("~'\u0001\u0002");
144
145   private static final char AMP = '\u0001';  // Flags set in reader to denote & and = characters.
146   private static final char EQ = '\u0002';
147   private static final AsciiSet endCharsParam = AsciiSet.of("" + AMP);
148   private static final AsciiSet endCharsNormal = AsciiSet.of(",)" + AMP);
149
150   /**
151    * Creates a new builder for this object.
152    *
153    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
154    * @return A new builder.
155    */
156   @SuppressWarnings({
157      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers use it to construct session instances polymorphically
158   })
159   public static Builder<?> create(UonParser ctx) {
160      return new DefaultBuilder(ctx);
161   }
162
163   /*
164    * Returns true if the next character in the stream is preceded by an escape '~' character.
165    */
166   private static final boolean isInEscape(int c, ParserReader r, boolean prevIsInEscape) throws IOException {
167      if (c == '~' && ! prevIsInEscape) {
168         c = r.peek();
169         if (escapedChars.contains(c)) {
170            r.delete();
171            return true;
172         }
173      }
174      return false;
175   }
176
177   private static void skipSpace(ParserReader r) throws IOException {
178      int c = 0;
179      while ((c = r.read()) != -1) {
180         if (c <= 2 || ! Character.isWhitespace(c)) {
181            r.unread();
182            return;
183         }
184      }
185   }
186
187   private final boolean decoding;
188   private final boolean validateEnd;
189
190   /**
191    * Constructor.
192    *
193    * @param builder The builder for this object.
194    */
195   protected UonParserSession(Builder<?> builder) {
196      super(builder);
197      decoding = builder.decoding;
198      validateEnd = builder.validateEnd;
199   }
200
201   @Override /* RecordReadable */
202   public RecordReader parseRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
203      return RecordAdapter.reader(this, input);
204   }
205
206   @Override /* RecordReadable */
207   public boolean isRecordStreaming() {
208      return false;
209   }
210
211   /**
212    * Creates a {@link UonReader} from the specified parser pipe.
213    *
214    * @param pipe The parser input.
215    * @param decodeChars Whether the reader should automatically decode URL-encoded characters.
216    * @return A new {@link UonReader} object.
217    * @throws IOException Thrown by underlying stream.
218    */
219   public static final UonReader getUonReader(ParserPipe pipe, boolean decodeChars) throws IOException {
220      var r = pipe.getReader();
221      if (r instanceof UonReader r2)
222         return r2;
223      return new UonReader(pipe, decodeChars);
224   }
225
226   @Override /* Overridden from HttpPartParser */
227   public <T> T parse(HttpPartType partType, HttpPartSchema schema, String in, ClassMeta<T> toType) throws ParseException, SchemaValidationException {
228      if (in == null)
229         return null;
230      if (toType.isString() && ine(in)) {
231         // Shortcut - If we're returning a string and the value doesn't start with "'" or is "null", then
232         // just return the string since it's a plain value.
233         // This allows us to bypass the creation of a UonParserSession object.
234         char x = firstNonWhitespaceChar(in);
235         if (x != '\'' && x != 'n' && in.indexOf('~') == -1)
236            return (T)in;
237         if (x == 'n' && "null".equals(in))
238            return null;
239      }
240      try (var pipe = createPipe(in)) {
241         try (var r = getUonReader(pipe, false)) {
242            return parseAnything(toType, r, null, true, null);
243         }
244      } catch (ParseException e) {
245         throw e;
246      } catch (Exception e) {
247         throw new ParseException(e);
248      }
249   }
250
251   /**
252    * Workhorse method.
253    *
254    * @param <T> The class type being parsed, or <jk>null</jk> if unknown.
255    * @param eType The class type being parsed, or <jk>null</jk> if unknown.
256    * @param r The reader being parsed.
257    * @param outer The outer object (for constructing nested inner classes).
258    * @param isUrlParamValue
259    *    If <jk>true</jk>, then we're parsing a top-level URL-encoded value which is treated a bit different than the
260    *    default case.
261    * @param pMeta The current bean property being parsed.
262    * @return The parsed object.
263    * @throws IOException Thrown by underlying stream.
264    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
265    * @throws ExecutableException Exception occurred on invoked constructor/method/field.
266    */
267   @SuppressWarnings({
268      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for parser state machine
269      "java:S6541"  // Synchronization not needed for session-local state
270   })
271   public <T> T parseAnything(ClassMeta<?> eType, UonReader r, Object outer, boolean isUrlParamValue, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
272
273      if (eType == null)
274         eType = object();
275      var swap = (ObjectSwap<T,Object>)eType.getSwap(this);
276      var builder = (BuilderSwap<T,Object>)eType.getBuilderSwap(this);
277      ClassMeta<?> sType = null;
278      if (nn(builder))
279         sType = builder.getBuilderClassMeta(this);
280      else if (nn(swap))
281         sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
282      else
283         sType = eType;
284
285      if (sType.isOptional())
286         return (T)o(parseAnything(eType.getElementType(), r, outer, isUrlParamValue, pMeta));
287
288      setCurrentClass(sType);
289
290      Object o = null;
291
292      int c = r.peekSkipWs();
293
294      if (c == -1 || c == AMP) {
295         // If parameter is blank and it's an array or collection, return an empty list.
296         if (sType.isCollectionOrArray())
297            o = sType.newInstance();
298         else if (sType.isString() || sType.isObject())
299            o = "";
300         else if (sType.isPrimitive())
301            o = sType.getPrimitiveDefault();
302         // Otherwise, leave null.
303      } else if (sType.isVoid()) {
304         var s = parseString(r, isUrlParamValue);
305         if (nn(s))
306            throw new ParseException(this, "Expected ''null'' for void value, but was ''{0}''.", s);
307      } else if (sType.isObject()) {
308         if (c == '(') {
309            var m = newGenericMap();
310            parseIntoMap(r, m, string(), object(), pMeta);
311            o = cast(m, pMeta, eType);
312         } else if (c == '@') {
313            Collection l = newGenericList();
314            o = parseIntoCollection(r, l, sType, isUrlParamValue, pMeta);
315         } else {
316            var s = parseString(r, isUrlParamValue);
317            if (c != '\'') {
318               if ("true".equals(s) || "false".equals(s))
319                  o = b(s);
320               else {
321                  if (isNumeric(s))
322                     o = StringUtils.parseNumber(s, Number.class);
323                  else
324                     o = s;
325               }
326            } else {
327               o = s;
328            }
329         }
330      } else if (nn(builder)) {
331         var m = toBeanMap(builder.create(this, eType));
332         m = parseIntoBeanMap(r, m);
333         o = m == null ? null : builder.build(this, m.getBean(), eType);
334      } else if (sType.canCreateNewBean(outer)) {
335         var m = newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner());
336         m = parseIntoBeanMap(r, m);
337         o = m == null ? null : m.getBean();
338      } else if (sType.isMap()) {
339         var m = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Map)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericMap(sType));
340         o = parseIntoMap(r, m, sType.getKeyType(), sType.getValueType(), pMeta);
341      } else if (sType.isCollection()) {
342         if (c == '(') {
343            var m = newGenericMap();
344            parseIntoMap(r, m, string(), object(), pMeta);
345            // Handle case where it's a collection, but serialized as a map with a _type or _value key.
346            if (m.containsKey(getBeanTypePropertyName(sType)))
347               o = cast(m, pMeta, eType);
348            // Handle case where it's a collection, but only a single value was specified.
349            else {
350               var l = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Collection)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericList());
351               l.add(m.cast(sType.getElementType()));
352               o = l;
353            }
354         } else {
355            var l = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Collection)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericList());
356            o = parseIntoCollection(r, l, sType, isUrlParamValue, pMeta);
357         }
358      } else if (sType.isArray() || sType.isArgs()) {
359         if (c == '(') {
360            var m = newGenericMap();
361            parseIntoMap(r, m, string(), object(), pMeta);
362            // Handle case where it's an array, but serialized as a map with a _type or _value key.
363            if (m.containsKey(getBeanTypePropertyName(sType)))
364               o = cast(m, pMeta, eType);
365            // Handle case where it's an array, but only a single value was specified.
366            else {
367               var l = listOfSize(1);
368               l.add(m.cast(sType.getElementType()));
369               o = toArray(sType, l);
370            }
371         } else {
372            var l = (ArrayList)parseIntoCollection(r, list(), sType, isUrlParamValue, pMeta);
373            o = toArray(sType, l);
374         }
375      } else if (sType.isCharSequence()) {
376         o = parseString(r, isUrlParamValue);
377      } else if (sType.isChar()) {
378         o = parseCharacter(parseString(r, isUrlParamValue));
379      } else if (sType.isNumber()) {
380         o = parseNumber(r, (Class<? extends Number>)sType.inner());
381      } else if (sType.isBoolean()) {
382         o = parseBoolean(r);
383      } else if (sType.isDate()) {
384         o = parseDate(parseString(r, isUrlParamValue), sType);
385      } else if (sType.isCalendar()) {
386         o = parseCalendar(parseString(r, isUrlParamValue), sType);
387      } else if (sType.isTemporal()) {
388         o = parseTemporal(parseString(r, isUrlParamValue), sType);
389      } else if (sType.isDuration()) {
390         o = parseDuration(parseString(r, isUrlParamValue));
391      } else if (sType.isPeriod()) {
392         o = parsePeriod(parseString(r, isUrlParamValue));
393      } else if (sType.canCreateNewInstanceFromString(outer)) {
394         var s = parseString(r, isUrlParamValue);
395         if (nn(s))
396            o = sType.newInstanceFromString(outer, s);
397      } else if (c == '(') {
398         // It could be a non-bean with _type attribute.
399         var m = newGenericMap();
400         parseIntoMap(r, m, string(), object(), pMeta);
401         if (m.containsKey(getBeanTypePropertyName(sType)))
402            o = cast(m, pMeta, eType);
403         else if (nn(sType.getProxyInvocationHandler()))
404            o = newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner()).load(m).getBean();
405         else
406            throw new ParseException(this, "Class ''{0}'' could not be instantiated.  Reason: ''{1}''", cn(sType), sType.getNotABeanReason());
407      } else if (c == 'n') {
408         @SuppressWarnings({
409            "unused" // Intentionally unused; variable/parameter is required by the interface contract
410         })
411         int ignored = r.read();
412         parseNull(r);
413      } else {
414         throw new ParseException(this, "Class ''{0}'' could not be instantiated.  Reason: ''{1}''", cn(sType), sType.getNotABeanReason());
415      }
416
417      if (o == null && sType.isPrimitive())
418         o = sType.getPrimitiveDefault();
419      if (nn(swap) && nn(o))
420         o = unswap(swap, o, eType);
421
422      if (nn(outer))
423         setParent(eType, o, outer);
424
425      return (T)o;
426   }
427
428   @SuppressWarnings({
429      "java:S2447" // null is a valid UON value distinct from true/false; Boolean (boxed) is deliberately used for this tristate
430   })
431   private Boolean parseBoolean(UonReader r) throws IOException, ParseException {
432      var s = parseString(r, false);
433      if (s == null || s.equals("null"))
434         return null;
435      if (eqic(s, "true"))
436         return true;
437      if (eqic(s, "false"))
438         return false;
439      throw new ParseException(this, "Unrecognized syntax for boolean.  ''{0}''.", s);
440   }
441
442   @SuppressWarnings({
443      "java:S1168",    // Intentionally returns null for empty/EOF or parseAttrName('%00') in this parser state machine.
444      "java:S2583",    // S1 checks c==-1/AMP for defensive completeness; while-guard makes these sub-expressions always-false
445      "java:S3776",    // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
446      "java:S6541",    // Single-threaded session contexts do not require synchronization
447   })
448   private <T> BeanMap<T> parseIntoBeanMap(UonReader r, BeanMap<T> m) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
449
450      int c = r.readSkipWs();
451      if (c == -1 || c == AMP)
452         return null;
453      if (c == 'n')
454         return (BeanMap<T>)parseNull(r);
455      if (c != '(')
456         throw new ParseException(this, "Expected '(' at beginning of object.");
457
458      // S1: Looking for attrName start.
459      // S2: Found attrName end, looking for =.
460      // S3: Found =, looking for valStart.
461      // S4: Looking for , or }
462
463      var state = S1;
464      var currAttr = "";
465      mark();
466      try {
467         while (true) {
468            c = r.read();
469            if (state == S1) {
470               if (c == ')' || c == -1 || c == AMP) {
471                  return m;
472               }
473               if (Character.isWhitespace(c))
474                  skipSpace(r);
475               else {
476                  r.unread();
477                  mark();
478                  currAttr = parseAttrName(r, decoding);
479                  if (currAttr == null) { // Value was '%00'
480                     return null;
481                  }
482                  state = S2;
483               }
484            } else if (state == S2) {
485               if (c == EQ || c == '=')
486                  state = S3;
487               else if (c == -1 || c == ',' || c == ')' || c == AMP) {
488                  m.put(currAttr, null);
489                  if (c == ')' || c == -1 || c == AMP) {
490                     return m;
491                  }
492                  state = S1;
493               }
494            } else if (state == S3) {
495               if (c == -1 || c == ',' || c == ')' || c == AMP) {
496                  if (! currAttr.equals(getBeanTypePropertyName((ClassMeta<?>) m.getBeanInfo()))) {
497                     var pMeta = m.getPropertyMeta(currAttr);
498                     if (pMeta == null) {
499                        onUnknownProperty(currAttr, m, null);
500                        unmark();
501                     } else {
502                        unmark();
503                        var value = convertToType("", (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo());
504                        try {
505                           pMeta.set(m, currAttr, value);
506                        } catch (BeanRuntimeException e) {
507                           onBeanSetterException(pMeta, e);
508                           throw e;
509                        }
510                     }
511                  }
512                  if (c == -1 || c == ')' || c == AMP)
513                     return m;
514                  state = S1;
515               } else {
516                  if (! currAttr.equals(getBeanTypePropertyName((ClassMeta<?>) m.getBeanInfo()))) {
517                     var pMeta = m.getPropertyMeta(currAttr);
518                     if (pMeta == null) {
519                        onUnknownProperty(currAttr, m, parseAnything(object(), r.unread(), m.getBean(false), false, null));
520                        unmark();
521                     } else {
522                        unmark();
523                        setCurrentProperty(pMeta);
524                        var cm = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
525                        var value = parseAnything(cm, r.unread(), m.getBean(false), false, pMeta);
526                        setName(cm, value, currAttr);
527                        try {
528                           pMeta.set(m, currAttr, value);
529                        } catch (BeanRuntimeException e) {
530                           onBeanSetterException(pMeta, e);
531                           throw e;
532                        }
533                        setCurrentProperty(null);
534                     }
535                  }
536                  state = S4;
537               }
538            } else if (state == S4) {
539               if (c == ',')
540                  state = S1;
541               else if (c == ')' || c == -1 || c == AMP) {
542                  return m;
543               }
544            }
545         }
546      } finally {
547         unmark();
548      }
549   }
550
551   @SuppressWarnings({
552      "java:S1168",    // Intentionally returns null for EOF/AMP in this parser state machine.
553      "java:S1854",    // argIndex=0 is the valid starting arg index; Sonar FP on early-return paths that never read it
554      "java:S2583",    // State variables persist across loop iterations
555      "java:S2589",    // Final if (state==S3) is always true given prior check; exhaustive state error-reporting pattern
556      "java:S6541",    // Brain method acceptable for parser state machine
557      "java:S3776"     // Cognitive complexity acceptable for parser state machine
558   })
559   private <E> Collection<E> parseIntoCollection(UonReader r, Collection<E> l, ClassMeta<E> type, boolean isUrlParamValue, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta)
560      throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
561
562      int c = r.readSkipWs();
563      if (c == -1 || c == AMP)
564         return null;
565      if (c == 'n')
566         return (Collection<E>)parseNull(r);
567
568      int argIndex = 0;
569
570      // If we're parsing a top-level parameter, we're allowed to have comma-delimited lists outside parenthesis (e.g. "&foo=1,2,3&bar=a,b,c")
571      // This is not allowed at lower levels since we use comma's as end delimiters.
572      boolean isInParens = (c == '@');
573      if (! isInParens) {
574         if (isUrlParamValue)
575            r.unread();
576         else
577            throw new ParseException(this, "Could not find '(' marking beginning of collection.");
578      } else {
579         @SuppressWarnings({
580            "unused" // Intentionally unused; variable/parameter is required by the interface contract
581         })
582         int ignored = r.read();
583      }
584
585      if (isInParens) {
586         // S1: Looking for starting of first entry.
587         // S2: Looking for starting of subsequent entries.
588         // S3: Looking for , or ) after first entry.
589
590         var state = S1;
591         while (c != -1 && c != AMP) {
592            c = r.read();
593            if (state == S1 || state == S2) {
594               if (c == ')') {
595                  if (state == S2) {
596                     l.add((E)parseAnything(type.isArgs() ? type.getArg(argIndex++) : type.getElementType(), r.unread(), l, false, pMeta));
597                     @SuppressWarnings({
598                        "unused" // Intentionally unused; variable/parameter is required by the interface contract
599                     })
600                     int ignored = r.read();
601                  }
602                  return l;
603               } else if (Character.isWhitespace(c)) {
604                  skipSpace(r);
605               } else {
606                  l.add((E)parseAnything(type.isArgs() ? type.getArg(argIndex++) : type.getElementType(), r.unread(), l, false, pMeta));
607                  state = S3;
608               }
609            } else if (state == S3) {
610               if (c == ',') {
611                  state = S2;
612               } else if (c == ')') {
613                  return l;
614               }
615            }
616         }
617         if (state == S1 || state == S2)
618            throw new ParseException(this, "Could not find start of entry in array.");
619         if (state == S3)
620            throw new ParseException(this, "Could not find end of entry in array.");
621
622      } else {
623         // S1: Looking for starting of entry.
624         // S2: Looking for , or & or END after first entry.
625
626         var state = S1;
627         while (c != -1 && c != AMP) {
628            c = r.read();
629            if (state == S1) {
630               if (Character.isWhitespace(c)) {
631                  skipSpace(r);
632               } else {
633                  l.add((E)parseAnything(type.isArgs() ? type.getArg(argIndex++) : type.getElementType(), r.unread(), l, false, pMeta));
634                  state = S2;
635               }
636            } else if (state == S2) {
637               if (c == ',') {
638                  state = S1;
639               } else if (Character.isWhitespace(c)) {
640                  skipSpace(r);
641               } else if (c == AMP || c == -1) {
642                  r.unread();
643                  return l;
644               }
645            }
646         }
647      }
648
649      return null;  // Unreachable.
650   }
651
652   @SuppressWarnings({
653      "java:S1168",    // Intentionally returns null for EOF/AMP in this parser state machine.
654      "java:S2583",    // Defensive c==-1/AMP sub-checks inside the while(c!=-1 && c!=AMP) loop; kept for state-machine completeness.
655      "java:S6541",    // Brain method acceptable for parser state machine
656      "java:S3776"     // Cognitive complexity acceptable for parser state machine
657   })
658   private <K,V> Map<K,V> parseIntoMap(UonReader r, Map<K,V> m, ClassMeta<K> keyType, ClassMeta<V> valueType, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
659
660      if (keyType == null)
661         keyType = (ClassMeta<K>)string();
662
663      int c = r.read();
664      if (c == -1 || c == AMP)
665         return null;
666      if (c == 'n')
667         return (Map<K,V>)parseNull(r);
668      if (c != '(')
669         throw new ParseException(this, "Expected '(' at beginning of object.");
670
671      // S1: Looking for attrName start.
672      // S2: Found attrName end, looking for =.
673      // S3: Found =, looking for valStart.
674      // S4: Looking for , or )
675
676      var state = S1;
677      K currAttr = null;
678      while (c != -1 && c != AMP) {
679         c = r.read();
680         if (state == S1) {
681            if (c == ')')
682               return m;
683            if (Character.isWhitespace(c))
684               skipSpace(r);
685            else {
686               r.unread();
687               var attr = parseAttr(r, decoding);
688               currAttr = attr == null ? null : convertAttrToType(m, trim(attr.toString()), keyType);
689               state = S2;
690            }
691         } else if (state == S2) {
692            if (c == EQ || c == '=')
693               state = S3;
694            else if (c == -1 || c == ',' || c == ')' || c == AMP) {
695               if (currAttr == null) {
696                  // Value was '%00'
697                  r.unread();
698                  return null;
699               }
700               m.put(currAttr, null);
701               if (c == ')' || c == -1 || c == AMP)
702                  return m;
703               state = S1;
704            }
705         } else if (state == S3) {
706            if (c == -1 || c == ',' || c == ')' || c == AMP) {
707               V value = convertAttrToType(m, "", valueType);
708               m.put(currAttr, value);
709               if (c == -1 || c == ')' || c == AMP)
710                  return m;
711               state = S1;
712            } else {
713               V value = parseAnything(valueType, r.unread(), m, false, pMeta);
714               setName(valueType, value, currAttr);
715               m.put(currAttr, value);
716               state = S4;
717            }
718         } else if (state == S4) {
719            if (c == ',')
720               state = S1;
721            else if (c == ')' || c == -1 || c == AMP) {
722               return m;
723            }
724         }
725      }
726
727      return null; // Reachable via trailing comma at EOF (lenient parse of e.g. "(a=1,").
728   }
729
730   private Object parseNull(UonReader r) throws IOException, ParseException {
731      var s = parseString(r, false);
732      if ("ull".equals(s))
733         return null;
734      throw new ParseException(this, "Unexpected character sequence: ''{0}''", s);
735   }
736
737   private Number parseNumber(UonReader r, Class<? extends Number> c) throws IOException, ParseException {
738      var s = parseString(r, false);
739      if (s == null)
740         return null;
741      return StringUtils.parseNumber(s, c);
742   }
743
744   /*
745    * Parses a string of the form "'foo'"
746    * All whitespace within parenthesis are preserved.
747    */
748   private String parsePString(UonReader r) throws IOException, ParseException {
749
750      @SuppressWarnings({
751         "unused" // Intentionally unused; variable/parameter is required by the interface contract
752      })
753      int ignored = r.read();
754      r.mark();
755      int c = 0;
756
757      boolean isInEscape = false;
758      while (c != -1) {
759         c = r.read();
760         if (! isInEscape && c == '\'')
761            return trim(r.getMarked(0, -1));
762         if (c == EQ)
763            r.replace('=');
764         isInEscape = isInEscape(c, r, isInEscape);
765      }
766      throw new ParseException(this, "Unmatched parenthesis");
767   }
768
769   /*
770    * Call this method after you've finished a parsing a string to make sure that if there's any
771    * remainder in the input, that it consists only of whitespace and comments.
772    */
773   private void validateEnd(UonReader r) throws IOException, ParseException {
774      if (! isValidateEnd())
775         return;
776      while (true) {
777         var c = r.read();
778         if (c == -1)
779            return;
780         if (! Character.isWhitespace(c))
781            throw new ParseException(this, "Remainder after parse: ''{0}''.", (char)c);
782      }
783   }
784
785   @Override /* Overridden from ParserSession */
786   protected <T> T doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
787      try (var r = getUonReader(pipe, decoding)) {
788         T o = parseAnything(type, r, getOuter(), true, null);
789         validateEnd(r);
790         return o;
791      }
792   }
793
794   @Override /* Overridden from ReaderParserSession */
795   protected <E> Collection<E> doParseIntoCollection(ParserPipe pipe, Collection<E> c, Type elementType) throws Exception {
796      try (var r = getUonReader(pipe, decoding)) {
797         c = parseIntoCollection(r, c, (ClassMeta<E>)getClassMeta(elementType), false, null);
798         validateEnd(r);
799         return c;
800      }
801   }
802
803   @Override /* Overridden from ReaderParserSession */
804   protected <K,V> Map<K,V> doParseIntoMap(ParserPipe pipe, Map<K,V> m, Type keyType, Type valueType) throws Exception {
805      try (var r = getUonReader(pipe, decoding)) {
806         m = parseIntoMap(r, m, (ClassMeta<K>)getClassMeta(keyType), (ClassMeta<V>)getClassMeta(valueType), null);
807         validateEnd(r);
808         return m;
809      }
810   }
811
812   /**
813    * Decode <js>"%xx"</js> sequences.
814    *
815    * @see UonParser.Builder#decoding()
816    * @return
817    *    <jk>true</jk> if URI encoded characters should be decoded, <jk>false</jk> if they've already been decoded
818    *    before being passed to this parser.
819    */
820   protected final boolean isDecoding() { return decoding; }
821
822   /**
823    * Validate end.
824    *
825    * @see UonParser.Builder#validateEnd()
826    * @return
827    *    <jk>true</jk> if after parsing a POJO from the input, verifies that the remaining input in
828    *    the stream consists of only comments or whitespace.
829    */
830   protected final boolean isValidateEnd() { return validateEnd; }
831
832   /**
833    * Convenience method for parsing an attribute from the specified parser.
834    *
835    * @param r The reader.
836    * @param encoded Whether the attribute is encoded.
837    * @return The parsed object
838    * @throws IOException Exception thrown by underlying stream.
839    * @throws ParseException Attribute was malformed.
840    */
841   protected final Object parseAttr(UonReader r, boolean encoded) throws IOException, ParseException {
842      return parseAttrName(r, encoded);
843   }
844
845   /**
846    * Parses an attribute name from the specified reader.
847    *
848    * @param r The reader.
849    * @param encoded Whether the attribute is encoded.
850    * @return The parsed attribute name.
851    * @throws IOException Exception thrown by underlying stream.
852    * @throws ParseException Attribute name was malformed.
853    */
854   @SuppressWarnings({
855      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for parser state machine
856   })
857   protected final String parseAttrName(UonReader r, boolean encoded) throws IOException, ParseException {
858
859      // If string is of form 'xxx', we're looking for ' at the end.
860      // Otherwise, we're looking for '&' or '=' or WS or -1 denoting the end of this string.
861
862      int c = r.peekSkipWs();
863      if (c == '\'')
864         return parsePString(r);
865
866      r.mark();
867      boolean isInEscape = false;
868      if (encoded) {
869         while (true) {
870            c = r.read();
871            if (! isInEscape) {
872               if (c == AMP || c == EQ || c == -1 || Character.isWhitespace(c)) {
873                  if (c != -1)
874                     r.unread();
875                  var s = r.getMarked();
876                  return ("null".equals(s) ? null : s);
877               }
878            } else if (c == AMP)
879               r.replace('&');
880            else if (c == EQ)
881               r.replace('=');
882            isInEscape = isInEscape(c, r, isInEscape);
883         }
884      } else {
885         while (true) {
886            c = r.read();
887            if (! isInEscape && (c == '=' || c == -1 || Character.isWhitespace(c))) {
888               if (c != -1)
889                  r.unread();
890               var s = r.getMarked();
891               return ("null".equals(s) ? null : trim(s));
892            }
893            isInEscape = isInEscape(c, r, isInEscape);
894         }
895      }
896   }
897
898   /**
899    * Parses a string value from the specified reader.
900    *
901    * @param r The input reader.
902    * @param isUrlParamValue Whether this is a URL parameter.
903    * @return The parsed string.
904    * @throws IOException Exception thrown by underlying stream.
905    * @throws ParseException Malformed input found.
906    */
907   protected final String parseString(UonReader r, boolean isUrlParamValue) throws IOException, ParseException {
908
909      // If string is of form 'xxx', we're looking for ' at the end.
910      // Otherwise, we're looking for ',' or ')' or -1 denoting the end of this string.
911
912      int c = r.peekSkipWs();
913      if (c == '\'')
914         return parsePString(r);
915
916      r.mark();
917      boolean isInEscape = false;
918      String s = null;
919      var endChars = (isUrlParamValue ? endCharsParam : endCharsNormal);
920      while (c != -1) {
921         c = r.read();
922         if (! isInEscape && endChars.contains(c)) {
923            // If this is a URL parameter value, we're looking for:  &
924            // If not, we're looking for:  &,)
925            r.unread();
926            c = -1;
927         }
928         if (c == -1)
929            s = r.getMarked();
930         else if (c == EQ)
931            r.replace('=');
932         else if (Character.isWhitespace(c) && ! isUrlParamValue) {
933            s = r.getMarked(0, -1);
934            skipSpace(r);
935            c = -1;
936         }
937         isInEscape = isInEscape(c, r, isInEscape);
938      }
939
940      if (isUrlParamValue)
941         s = StringUtils.trim(s);
942
943      return ("null".equals(s) ? null : trim(s));
944   }
945
946   @Override /* Overridden from ReaderParserSession */
947   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
948      return super.properties()
949         .a(PROP_decoding, decoding)
950         .a(PROP_validateEnd, validateEnd);
951   }
952}
